description: Test quality check L04 #2 for plateau6 (CityGML 3.0). Building bldg_b3eef114 has bldg:class with codeSpace pointing at https://www.geospatial.jp/iur/codelists/4.0/invalid_codespace.xml, a codelist file that does not exist in the bundled i-UR 4.0 codelists; the codeSpace cannot be resolved, so 不正なcodeSpace数=1, L04エラー=0. The code value 3003 itself is a valid Building_class code; only the codeSpace is broken. The other building (bldg_b3eef115) is clean. This is the CityGML 3.0 counterpart of plateau4/01-01-common/L04_02; the only material difference from plateau4 is the codeSpace form (relative ../../codelists/... -> absolute https URL). The objectlist xlsx under fixtures/plateau6-citymodel/ is a stand-in (copied from plateau4) until the i-UR 4.0 取得項目一覧 is finalized.
